item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-01)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 40970 Trending skills: 18308 Hot skills: 2088 Top All Time: find-skills (358932) Top Trending: agent-browser (15428) Top Hot: sleek-design-mobile-apps (555)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#1): sleek-design-mobile-apps
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #1 Installs: 555 Source: sleekdotdesign/agent-skills Description: Use when the user wants to design a mobile app, create screens, build UI, or interact with their Sleek projects. Covers high-level requests ("design an app that does X") and specific ones ("list my projects", "create a new project", "screenshot that screen").

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#10): authentication-setup
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #10 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design and implement authentication and authorization systems. Use when setting up user login, JWT tokens, OAuth, session management, or role-based access control. Handles password security, token management, SSO integration.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#11): sprint-retrospective
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #11 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Facilitate effective sprint retrospectives for continuous team improvement. Use when conducting team retrospectives, identifying improvements, or fostering team collaboration. Handles retrospective formats, action items, and facilitation techniques.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#12): frontend-design-system
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #12 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Produce production-grade UI designs using clear design tokens, layout rules, motion guidance, and accessibility checks for consistent, scalable frontend development.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#13): system-environment-setup
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #13 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Configure development and production environments for consistent and reproducible setups. Use when setting up new projects, Docker environments, or development tooling. Handles Docker Compose, .env configuration, dev containers, and infrastructure as code.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#14): api-documentation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #14 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Create comprehensive API documentation for developers. Use when documenting REST APIs, GraphQL schemas, or SDK methods. Handles OpenAPI/Swagger, interactive docs, examples, and API reference guides.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#15): testing-strategies
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #15 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design comprehensive testing strategies for software quality assurance. Use when planning test coverage, implementing test pyramids, or setting up testing infrastructure. Handles unit testing, integration testing, E2E testing, TDD, and testing best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#16): log-analysis
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #16 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Analyze application logs to identify errors, performance issues, and security anomalies. Use when debugging issues, monitoring system health, or investigating incidents. Handles various log formats including Apache, Nginx, application logs, and JSON logs.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#17): web-design-guidelines
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #17 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance. Use when asked to "review my UI", "check accessibility", "audit design", "review UX", or "check my site against best practices". Fetches latest Vercel guidelines and checks files against all rules.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#18): agent-evaluation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #18 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design and implement comprehensive evaluation systems for AI agents. Use when building evals for coding agents, conversational agents, research agents, or computer-use agents. Covers grader types, benchmarks, 8-step roadmap, and production integration.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#19): agentic-development-principles
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #19 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: AI 에이전트와 협업하는 에이전틱 개발의 범용 원칙. 분해정복, 컨텍스트 관리, 추상화 수준 선택, 자동화 철학을 정의. 모든 AI 코딩 도구에 적용 가능.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#2): azure-cloud-migrate
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #2 Installs: 111 Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Assess and migrate cross-cloud workloads to Azure. Generates assessment reports and converts code from AWS, GCP, or other providers to Azure services. WHEN: "migrate Lambda to Azure Functions", "migrate AWS to Azure", "Lambda migration assessment", "convert AWS serverless to Azure", "migration readiness report", "migrate from AWS", "migrate from GCP", "cross-cloud migration".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#20): api-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #20 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design RESTful and GraphQL APIs following best practices. Use when creating new APIs, refactoring existing endpoints, or documenting API specifications. Handles OpenAPI, REST, GraphQL, versioning.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#21): environment-setup
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #21 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Configure and manage development, staging, and production environments. Use when setting up environment variables, managing configurations, or separating environments. Handles .env files, config management, and environment-specific settings.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#22): user-guide-writing
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #22 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Write clear and helpful user guides and tutorials for end users. Use when creating onboarding docs, how-to guides, or FAQ pages. Handles user-focused documentation, screenshots, step-by-step instructions.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#23): changelog-maintenance
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #23 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Maintain a clear and informative changelog for software releases. Use when documenting version changes, tracking features, or communicating updates to users. Handles semantic versioning, changelog formats, and release notes.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#24): code-refactoring
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #24 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Simplify and refactor code while preserving behavior, improving clarity, and reducing complexity. Use when simplifying complex code, removing duplication, or applying design patterns. Handles Extract Method, DRY principle, SOLID principles, behavior validation, and refactoring patterns.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#25): opencontext
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #25 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: OpenContext를 활용한 AI 에이전트 영구 메모리 및 컨텍스트 관리. 세션/레포/날짜 간 컨텍스트 유지, 결론 저장, 문서 검색 워크플로우 제공.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#26): responsive-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #26 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Create responsive web designs that work across all devices and screen sizes. Use when building mobile-first layouts, implementing breakpoints, or optimizing for different viewports. Handles CSS Grid, Flexbox, media queries, viewport units, and responsive images.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#27): skill-standardization
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #27 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Standardize and validate SKILL.md files to match the project specification. Use when creating new skills, converting existing skills to standard format, or validating skill file structure. Handles section heading conversion, frontmatter standardization, and missing section detection.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#28): security-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #28 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Implement security best practices for web applications and infrastructure. Use when securing APIs, preventing common vulnerabilities, or implementing security policies. Handles HTTPS, CORS, XSS, SQL Injection, CSRF, rate limiting, and OWASP Top 10.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#29): workflow-automation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #29 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Automate repetitive development tasks and workflows. Use when creating build scripts, automating deployments, or setting up development workflows. Handles npm scripts, Makefile, GitHub Actions workflows, and task automation.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#3): pptx-presentation-builder
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #3 Installs: 55 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Build professional PPTX presentations with brand-aligned layouts using structured deck briefs and validation steps for pitch, roadmap, and product decks.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#30): deployment-automation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #30 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Automate application deployment to cloud platforms and servers. Use when setting up CI/CD pipelines, deploying to Docker/Kubernetes, or configuring cloud infrastructure. Handles GitHub Actions, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Vercel, and deployment best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#31): state-management
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #31 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Implement state management patterns for frontend applications. Use when managing global state, handling complex data flows, or coordinating state across components. Handles React Context, Redux, Zustand, Recoil, and state management best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#32): task-planning
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #32 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Plan and organize software development tasks effectively. Use when breaking down features, creating user stories, or planning sprints. Handles task breakdown, user stories, acceptance criteria, and backlog management.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#34): codebase-search
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #34 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Search and navigate large codebases efficiently. Use when finding specific code patterns, tracing function calls, understanding code structure, or locating bugs. Handles semantic search, grep patterns, AST analysis.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#35): task-estimation
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Estimate software development tasks accurately using various techniques. Use when planning sprints, roadmaps, or project timelines. Handles story points, t-shirt sizing, planning poker, and estimation best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#36): agent-configuration
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #36 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: AI 에이전트 설정 정책 및 보안 가이드. 프로젝트 설명 파일 작성법, Hooks/Skills/Plugins 설정, 보안 정책, 팀 공유 워크플로우 정의.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#37): npm-git-install
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Install npm packages directly from GitHub repositories using git URLs. Use when installing packages from private repos, specific branches, or unreleased versions not yet on npm registry.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#38): standup-meeting
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Conduct effective daily standup meetings for agile teams. Use when facilitating standups, tracking blockers, or improving team synchronization. Handles standup format, time management, and blocker resolution.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): marketing-skills-collection
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Generate marketing deliverables across CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth using 23 specialized sub-skills with clear objectives, constraints, and validation.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#4): performance-optimization
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #4 Installs: 54 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Optimize application performance for speed, efficiency, and scalability. Use when improving page load times, reducing bundle size, optimizing database queries, or fixing performance bottlenecks. Handles React optimization, lazy loading, caching, code splitting, and profiling.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#40): vercel-deploy
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Deploy applications and websites to Vercel instantly. Use when asked to "Deploy my app", "Deploy this to production", "Create a preview deployment", or "Push this live". No authentication required - returns preview URL and claimable deployment link.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#41): firebase-ai-logic
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Integrate Firebase AI Logic (Gemini in Firebase) for intelligent app features. Use when adding AI capabilities to Firebase apps, implementing generative AI features, or setting up Firebase AI SDK. Handles Firebase AI SDK setup, prompt engineering, and AI-powered features.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): ui-component-patterns
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Build reusable, maintainable UI components following modern design patterns. Use when creating component libraries, implementing design systems, or building scalable frontend architectures. Handles React patterns, composition, prop design, TypeScript, and component best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#43): pattern-detection
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Detect patterns, anomalies, and trends in code and data. Use when identifying code smells, finding security vulnerabilities, or discovering recurring patterns. Handles regex patterns, AST analysis, and statistical anomaly detection.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): web-accessibility
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Implement web accessibility (a11y) standards following WCAG 2.1 guidelines. Use when building accessible UIs, fixing accessibility issues, or ensuring compliance with disability standards. Handles ARIA attributes, keyboard navigation, screen readers, semantic HTML, and accessibility testing.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#45): git-workflow
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Manage Git workflows including commits, branches, merges, and collaboration. Use when working with Git repositories, creating commits, managing branches, or resolving conflicts.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#46): agentic-principles
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: AI 에이전트 협업 개발의 핵심 원칙. 분해정복, 컨텍스트 관리, 추상화 수준 선택, 자동화 철학, 검증 회고를 정의. 모든 AI 에이전트 사용 시 최적의 협업 패턴 적용.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): database-schema-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design and optimize database schemas for SQL and NoSQL databases. Use when creating new databases, designing tables, defining relationships, indexing strategies, or database migrations. Handles PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, normalization, and performance optimization.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): looker-studio-bigquery
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Design and configure Looker Studio dashboards with BigQuery data sources. Use when creating analytics dashboards, connecting BigQuery to visualization tools, or optimizing data pipeline performance. Handles BigQuery connections, custom SQL queries, scheduled queries, dashboard design, and performance optimization.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#49): vercel-react-best-practices
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. Use when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#5): technical-writing
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #5 Installs: 53 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Write clear, comprehensive technical documentation. Use when creating specs, architecture docs, runbooks, or API documentation. Handles technical specifications, system design docs, operational guides, and developer documentation with industry best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#50): monitoring-observability
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 51 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Set up monitoring, logging, and observability for applications and infrastructure. Use when implementing health checks, metrics collection, log aggregation, or alerting systems. Handles Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack, Datadog, and monitoring best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#6): remotion-video-production
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #6 Installs: 53 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Produce programmable videos with Remotion using scene planning, asset orchestration, and validation gates for automated, brand-consistent video content.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#7): file-organization
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #7 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Organize project files and folders for maintainability and scalability. Use when structuring new projects, refactoring folder structure, or establishing conventions. Handles project structure, naming conventions, and file organization best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#8): debugging
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #8 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Systematically debug code issues using proven methodologies. Use when encountering errors, unexpected behavior, or performance problems. Handles error analysis, root cause identification, debugging strategies, and fix verification.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#9): agentic-workflow
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #9 Installs: 52 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: AI 에이전트 실전 워크플로우와 생산성 기법. 명령어, 단축키, Git 통합, MCP 활용, 세션 관리 등 일상 개발 작업의 최적화 패턴 제공.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#10): sleek-design-mobile-apps
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #10 Installs: 9592 Source: sleekdotdesign/agent-skills Description: Use when the user wants to design a mobile app, create screens, build UI, or interact with their Sleek projects. Covers high-level requests ("design an app that does X") and specific ones ("list my projects", "create a new project", "screenshot that screen").
